title: P≠NP Oracle Problem Re-examined Through EML

analysis.object: T388: P≠NP Oracle Problem Re-examined Through EML depth analysis

oracle_A.reason: relativized world with P=NP lives at EML-2

oracle_B.reason: relativized world with P≠NP lives at EML-inf

bgs_result.description: BGS: both worlds exist; no relativizing proof can decide

delta_d_zero.reason: oracle queries dont change EML stratum

barrier_theorem.description: No depth-preserving operation proves EML-inf separation
barrier_theorem.reason: T388: oracle barrier = Deltad=0 cannot breach EML-2/inf wall

analysis.theorem: T388: P≠NP Oracle Problem Re-examined Through EML (S667).

key_theorem: T388: P≠NP Oracle Problem Re-examined Through EML (S667).
